tool_args.label: ERG All Member Meeting and Recruitment Fair
tool_args.raw_text: Employee Resource Group – All Member Meeting and Recruitment Fair Long Island Rail Road (LIRR) Hillside – December 10, 2024

payload.description: ERG All Member Meeting and Recruitment Fair at LIRR Hillside. Continued theme Connections: D&I in Motion for 2024. Focused on Sense of Belonging and thanking ERG Leads. Recruitment fair for LIRR employees. Twenty new members signed up for one of ten employee resource groups.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Employee Resource Group – All Member Meeting and Recruitment Fair Long Island Rail Road (LIRR) Hillside – December 10, 2024

We continued our theme Connections: D&I in Motion for 2024. We focused on Sense of Belonging and ending the year thanking our ERG Leads... We had twenty new members sign up for one of the ten employee resource groups.
